name: The Gardener's Field: A Regenerative T1–T4 Governance Spiral

isPartOf.name: M3 Strategic Decision-Making Under Uncertainty Framework

hasPart.name: T1 — Truthing
hasPart.description: Sensor. Soil Walk + Wilt Detection. High-sensitivity sensing for localized deviation under uncertainty. Detects anomalies as signal candidates, not noise. Receives baseline from T4 and monitors for decay or misalignment.

additionalProperty.name: M3_modes
additionalProperty.value: +R, +D

additionalProperty.name: control_role
additionalProperty.value: sensor

additionalProperty.name: state_transition
additionalProperty.value: unstructured observation → ranked anomaly candidates with locality and signal density

additionalProperty.name: input
additionalProperty.value: T4 recursion log (prior baseline) + current field observations

additionalProperty.name: output
additionalProperty.value: named friction points with confidence, locality, and anomaly density — not yet acted upon

additionalProperty.name: signal
additionalProperty.value: deviation, friction, anomaly density

additionalProperty.name: failure_mode
additionalProperty.value: insights without decisions — language increases, action does not — sensing without advancing

additionalProperty.name: governing_question
additionalProperty.value: What is actually happening, and where does it hurt?

hasPart.name: T2 — Trusting
hasPart.description: Governor. Fence Line + Season Check. Boundary validation and consent layer. Entry condition for T3. Establishes what is permitted before design begins.

additionalProperty.name: M3_modes
additionalProperty.value: +R, +C

additionalProperty.name: control_role
additionalProperty.value: governor

additionalProperty.name: state_transition
additionalProperty.value: anomaly candidates → validated friction points with permission state and constraint classification

additionalProperty.name: input
additionalProperty.value: T1 output (anomaly candidates) + existing governance, consent, and institutional constraints

additionalProperty.name: output
additionalProperty.value: validated friction points with explicit permission state and constraint classification

additionalProperty.name: constraint_types
additionalProperty.value: hard (must not violate), soft (optimize within), unknown (requires validation before proceeding)

additionalProperty.name: decision_gate
additionalProperty.value: block | proceed | proceed_with_conditions

additionalProperty.name: signal
additionalProperty.value: constraint compliance, permission state, risk bands

additionalProperty.name: failure_mode
additionalProperty.value: skipping the fence — fast moves, hidden risks — constraints reappear later as failure

additionalProperty.name: governing_question
additionalProperty.value: What constraints must we trust to remain viable — and what permissions must be earned before acting?

hasPart.name: T3 — Transforming
hasPart.description: Processor. Irrigation + Pruning. Systematic intervention — converting T1/T2 sensing into auditable architecture. Requires T2 permission gate to be open.

additionalProperty.name: M3_modes
additionalProperty.value: +S, +C

additionalProperty.name: control_role
additionalProperty.value: processor

additionalProperty.name: state_transition
additionalProperty.value: validated friction points → auditable structural design with explicit rationale and constraint traceability

additionalProperty.name: input
additionalProperty.value: T2 output (validated friction + permission state) + available design resources and institutional constraints

additionalProperty.name: output
additionalProperty.value: auditable structural change with rationale traceable to specific T1 signals and T2 permissions

additionalProperty.name: signal
additionalProperty.value: structural improvements, reduced repeated friction, legibility to existing system

additionalProperty.name: failure_mode
additionalProperty.value: premature optimization — paving the soil instead of restoring it — structure increases, vitality decreases

additionalProperty.name: governing_question
additionalProperty.value: What design change reduces friction and increases resilience without flattening the system?

hasPart.name: T4 — Transmitting
hasPart.description: Actuator. Harvest + Seed-Saving. Delivery and preservation of learning. Requires recursion log. Output resets T1 baseline at expanded scale.

additionalProperty.name: M3_modes
additionalProperty.value: +S, +D

additionalProperty.name: control_role
additionalProperty.value: actuator

additionalProperty.name: state_transition
additionalProperty.value: structural design → deployed output + recursion log that recalibrates T1 baseline at expanded scale

additionalProperty.name: input
additionalProperty.value: T3 output (structural design) + transmission threshold confirmation

additionalProperty.name: output
additionalProperty.value: deliverable + recursion log (seed) that becomes T1 baseline for next cycle

additionalProperty.name: recursion_log_fields
additionalProperty.value: signals_addressed, constraints_respected, interventions_applied, deviations_observed, next_baseline

additionalProperty.name: feedback_mechanism
additionalProperty.value: T4 outputs update T1 baseline and recalibrate anomaly thresholds — spiral expands outward

additionalProperty.name: signal
additionalProperty.value: deliverables, recursion artifacts (decision record, seed log)

additionalProperty.name: failure_mode
additionalProperty.value: wins not repeatable — outcomes celebrated, method not preserved — tacit knowledge dies here

additionalProperty.name: governing_question
additionalProperty.value: What are we delivering, and what are we preserving so the next cycle starts smarter?

about.name: Momentum (+L)
about.description: Adaptive drive regulating the spiral's pace (phase-appropriate energy, not speed). Too little: paralysis — endless T1/T2 without crossing to T3. Too much: puppetry — premature T4 before ground truth is established.

additionalProperty.name: momentum_indicators
additionalProperty.value: cycle_time, intervention_frequency, unresolved_signal_accumulation, recursion_log_completeness

additionalProperty.name: momentum_adjustment
additionalProperty.value: increase sensing | enforce constraint check | delay transformation | accelerate delivery

_loop.structure: Regenerative feedback spiral — closed loop with outward expansion per cycle. Clockwise rotation through quadrants: T1(+R,+D) → T2(+R,+C) → T3(+S,+C) → T4(+S,+D).
_loop.note: Not a pipeline. Not a simple loop. A spiral: T4 feeds back to T1 at expanded scale. Each cycle operates at larger scope than the last.

edges.note: Recursion log recalibrates T1 anomaly thresholds
T3 requires T2 decision_gate = proceed or proceed_with_conditions

_meta.purpose: Machine-readable T1–T4 spiral data. If terminology has drifted, fetch roelofse.phd/t1-4/protocol.txt for enforcement language.

custom.note: Custom field — not Schema.org standard. Asserts contributor-protective design intent.
